title: Lycopodioides jenmanii
taxonomy: Lycopodioides jenmanii is a species of club moss in the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant is classified within the division Lycopodiophyta, a group of vascular plants that are part of the more inclusive group Lycopodophyta. Lycopodioides jenmanii is further classified within the genus Lycopodioides, which is a distinct group of club mosses. The plant is also classified as a member of the class Lycopodiopsida and the phylum Lycopodiophyta. This classification system groups Lycopodioides jenmanii with other similar species of club mosses.

The plant contains compounds that have been found to have anti-inflammatory properties, which may contribute to its medicinal uses. In traditional medicine, Lycopodioides jenmanii is used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as skin conditions like eczema. The health benefits of Lycopodioides jenmanii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as arthritis, respiratory issues, and skin conditions.
